I had no idea this was a thing!😳 Guys.. we can use this! Good looking out @cattienle
https://t.co/bjYQLOxwam https://t.co/mwKeh0ItCS https://t.co/K9TpWeYG14
Yo @Kirgo is hooking it up,my code is in my IG bio 😉 https://t.co/9Bm7InEWxT https://t.co/hBYIYTpTGT
Gotta love @Kirgo for this one. If you bet with anyone else this is your sign to join the winning team 😉 https://t.co/tQ1evJksbp https://t.co/HUPB3vmQpT
Who won on the main event last night with @Kirgo ? I lost my ass.. wait no Diddy https://t.co/fCvRZcl4go
